# DECIMA-8: Global Registry of Neuromorphic Specifications 🧠

**Deterministic rhythm for neuromorphic computing: Emulator → Proto (PCB) → FPGA → ASIC**

## 🏛️ About

**DECIMA-8** is a neuromorphic engine architecture with deterministic rhythm and programmable tile fabric. We bridge the gap between stochastic AI generation and mission-critical neuromorphic execution through formal contracts and deterministic protocols.

**Status:** v0.2 DESIGN FREEZE

**Codename:** Siberian Tank Interface

## 📚 Documentation

| Language | URL |
|----------|-----|
| 🇷🇺 Russian | https://decima.rulerom.com/ru/ |
| 🇬🇧 English | https://decima.rulerom.com/en/ |
| 🇨🇳 Chinese | https://decima.rulerom.com/zh/ |

## 🏗 Core Pillars

| Pillar | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| **Level16** | 8 physical lanes, each carrying 16 discrete levels (0..15) |
| **Bidirectional VSB** | PHASE_READ: Conductor sets input; PHASE_WRITE: Island drives bus |
| **Tile = Minimal Entity** | RuleROM addresses tiles directly |
| **BUS16 (8 lane)** | All data through common bus with honest summing |
| **Dedicated Pattern ID Lane** | Separate uint16 channel for pattern output, doesn't clog main bus |
| **Activation Graph (Gating)** | Neighbors form logical strobe to allow reading from common bus |
| **Range Fuse (Latch)** | Hardware-level latch: activates only when level is within [lo..hi] range |
| **Decay-to-Zero** | Accumulator deterministically decays to 0 each cycle, no residual state |
| **Access Inheritance** | If ancestor unfuses — descendants start accumulating from zero; if it fuses again — they regain access |

## 📋 Specification Domains

| Domain | Purpose | Link |
|--------|---------|------|
| **🏗 Architecture** | Tile model, BUS16, phases, routing | [docs/arch/](ru/docs/arch/) |
| **📋 Specification** | Bake TLV, protocol, UDP | [docs/spec/](ru/docs/spec/) |
| **🛠️ Tools** | IDE for visual baking | [docs/tools/](ru/docs/tools/) |
| **🔌 Integration** | UDP protocol for cascading | [docs/integration/](ru/docs/integration/) |

## 🔄 Canonical Tick (EV_FLASH)

```
Setup → PHASE_READ → TURNAROUND → PHASE_WRITE → READOUT_SAMPLE → AUTORESET
```

| Phase | Duration | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| **PHASE_READ** | ~10µs | Tiles sample input, update runtime |
| **TURNAROUND** | ~2µs | Conductor: Hi-Z, Island: prepare drive |
| **PHASE_WRITE** | ~8µs | Island drives BUS16 |
| **READOUT** | ~1µs | Conductor reads BUS16 |
| **AUTORESET** | ~1µs | Optional domain reset |
| **Total** | **~22µs** | One deterministic cycle |

## 📊 Hard Constants v0.2

| Constant | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **VSB** | 8 data lanes VSB[0..7] |
| **BUS16** | 8 lane, summing in WRITE |
| **Domains** | 16 domains (0..15) |
| **Level16** | 0..15 (4 bits) |
| **RoutingFlags16** | 10 bits: N,E,S,W,NE,SE,SW,NW,BUS_R,BUS_W |

## 🛠️ Quick Start

### Run Documentation

```bash
# Russian version
cd ru
mkdocs serve

# English version
cd en
mkdocs serve

# Chinese version
cd zh
mkdocs serve
```

### Project Structure

```
decima/
├── ru/                     # Russian documentation
│   ├── mkdocs.yml
│   └── docs/
│       ├── index.md
│       ├── arch/           # Architecture
│       ├── spec/           # Specification
│       ├── tools/          # Tools
│       └── integration/    # Integration
├── en/                     # English documentation
│   ├── mkdocs.yml
│   └── docs/
├── zh/                     # Chinese documentation
│   ├── mkdocs.yml
│   └── docs/
├── old/                    # Archive materials
├── README.md
├── llms.txt
└── ai-plugin.json
```

| **🏛️ Swarm Council** | 16 elders in swarm core | https://intent-garden.org/swarm.html |
